sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: HSBC SEC Filings - Hsbc Holdings Plc 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
feed.summary: This page provides comprehensive access to HSBC Holdings Plc's SEC filings, including annual reports (20-F), current reports (6-K), and details on insider transactions. It highlights recent share buyback activities from June 2025, demonstrating the company's commitment to capital return and shareholder value. The platform uses AI-powered summaries to analyze these lengthy documents for investors.

feed.title: Smarter Raman QC for biopharma fill-finish with scalable model transfer
feed.summary: This webinar, sponsored by Thermo Fisher Scientific and featuring Product Manager Sudhir Dahal, will explore how modern Raman spectroscopy can enhance biopharma fill-finish quality control. It will cover faster analysis, multi-attribute insight, and scalable model transfer, addressing challenges like model revalidation and fluorescence interference. Attendees will learn practical strategies for implementing Raman QC reliably across various instruments and sites.

feed.title: PNC Private Bank Research Reveals Business Owners Increasingly Want Integrated Financial Advice to Help Align Business, Personal Goals
feed.summary: PNC Private Bank's new "Business Owner Wealth Insights" report, based on a national survey, indicates a strong desire among business owners for integrated financial advice that considers both their personal and business needs. Despite 89% valuing such advice, only 55% currently work with an advisor who addresses both. The research highlights critical areas such as succession planning, philanthropy, and tax strategy, emphasizing the interconnectedness of business and personal financial lives for owners.

feed.title: Cardinal Health expands Actinium-225 production capacity to support growing demand for novel cancer therapies
feed.summary: Cardinal Health has significantly expanded its Actinium-225 (Ac-225) production capabilities at its Center for Theranostics Advancement in Indianapolis, Indiana, by adding a high-capacity production line. This expansion will meet the growing global demand for cGMP-compliant Ac-225, a critical alpha-emitting radionuclide used in novel cancer therapies. The company has quadrupled its weekly output since late 2024 and expects further increases, supporting numerous clinical trials and preparing for future commercial volumes of targeted alpha therapies.

feed.title: Former German finance minister Joerg Kukies to join Morgan Stanley
feed.summary: Former German finance minister Joerg Kukies is set to join Morgan Stanley in May, first in London and then as country chief for Germany and Austria, overseeing continental European operations. Kukies previously served as a co-head at Goldman Sachs in Germany before becoming a deputy finance minister and then leading the finance ministry. His move reflects a trend of U.S. banks expanding their presence and market share in Germany.

feed.title: Citigroup Adjusts Price Target on SLB to $59 From $56, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Citigroup has raised its price target for SLB (formerly Schlumberger N.V.) from $56 to $59, while reiterating a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment comes as SLB, a leading oil and gas exploration and production services company, continues its operations and announces new agreements, such as a three-year deal with Azule Energy to expand its Delfi Digital Platform. The company also recently expanded its collaboration with Nvidia to develop AI infrastructure for the energy sector.

feed.title: Otis executives will outline 2026 outlook on April 22 webcast
feed.summary: Otis Worldwide Corporation (NYSE: OTIS) will host its First Quarter 2026 earnings conference call on Wednesday, April 22, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET. Chair, CEO & President Judy Marks and EVP & CFO Cristina Mendez will discuss Q1 results and the 2026 outlook. A webcast, presentation, and news release will be available on www.otis.com prior to the call.

feed.title: Merck to Hold First-Quarter 2026 Sales and Earnings Conference Call April 30
feed.summary: Merck (NYSE: MRK) will host its first-quarter 2026 sales and earnings conference call for institutional investors and analysts on Thursday, April 30, at 9:00 a.m. ET. Company executives will provide an overview of Merck's performance for the quarter during the call. A live audio webcast will be available, and a replay along with financial disclosures will be posted on www.merck.com.

feed.title: Cancer drug developers get more Actinium-225 as Cardinal Health expands
feed.summary: Cardinal Health (NYSE:CAH) has significantly expanded its Actinium-225 (Ac-225) production capacity at its Center for Theranostics Advancement in Indianapolis, quadrupling weekly output since late 2024. This expansion aims to meet the growing demand for novel targeted alpha cancer therapies, having already supported over 15 clinical trials worldwide. The company plans further capacity increases in 2026 to facilitate both clinical development and future commercial manufacturing of these critical oncology treatments.

feed.title: JPMorgan (AMJB) launches 10‑year Trigger GEARS with 65% downside threshold
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC is launching 10-year Trigger GEARS (Growth Enhanced Asset Return Securities) linked to a five-index equity basket, with a $10.00 issue price and a Downside Threshold of 65%. These securities offer enhanced growth potential with an Upside Gearing (expected 1.62-1.82) for positive basket returns, but expose investors to principal loss if the Final Basket Value falls below the threshold. The investment carries credit risk from both JPMorgan Financial and JPMorgan Chase & Co. and does not pay dividends or interest.

feed.title: New Tesla sales in Spain surge almost 25% year-on-year in March
feed.summary: Tesla's new car sales in Spain surged by 24.9% in March 2026 compared to March 2025, reaching 2,477 vehicles. For the first quarter of 2026, Tesla sales in Spain increased by 42.9% year-on-year, while total sales of electrified vehicles, including fully-electric and hybrids, grew by 58.4%. This data, released by industry group ANFAC, highlights a significant rise in Tesla's market presence and the broader shift towards electrified vehicles in Spain.

feed.title: Keysight (NYSE: KEYS) director sells 870 shares, keeps over 42K

feed.title: Dollar General Debuts New Home Collection by Singer-Songwriter & Entrepreneur Holly Williams
feed.summary: Dollar General has launched "xo Holly by Holly Williams," a new exclusive home collection by singer-songwriter Holly Williams. The collection, inspired by Williams' Southern roots, includes over 50 décor, kitchen, bedding, and housewares items priced from $1 to $20, with most items under $5. This collaboration aims to bring affordable, authentic homeware to Dollar General's approximately 20,000 stores nationwide.
